articles.author: Michael Birnbaum, Gerry Shih
articles.title: Trump’s grip on the GOP leaves Netanyahu with few places to turn - The Washington Post
articles.description: As Trump clamps down on Netanyahu, the Israeli leader is finding he has few avenues of appeal among American politicians.
articles.content: When previous U.S. presidents sought to tie the hands of Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, the Israeli leader often exploited rifts in U.S. politics to find a friendlier ear in Washington and wriggl… [+37 chars]
